data.current_summary: Create Swiss Invoice with QR Code
data.current_description: Generates a valid Swiss invoice with a QR code in PDF format. The invoice is stored temporarily and a download URL is returned. The file expires 24 hours after creation. Can be tested for free without an API key.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate Swiss invoice PDF with embedded QR code
data.description_suggestion: Generates a valid Swiss invoice in PDF format with an embedded QR code for payment processing. Accepts invoice data including issuer details (UserDetails), recipient details (CustomerDetails), and line items (InvoiceItem array). Returns a success response containing the generated PDF download URL and invoice metadata. The generated PDF file is stored temporarily and automatically expires 24 hours after creation. Authentication via API key is optional for testing purposes. Note: Ensure all required invoice fields are provided to generate a compliant Swiss invoice.

Improved summary to be more specific about the QR code embedding and PDF output format.
